snippet.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box).

The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis. 

Social Handles
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/othermommy/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/othermommy/
TikTok: http://www.tiktok.com/@othermommy
Official Site: https://www.othermommymovie.com
#OtherMommy

Saath de raha, hai bas mera….
Yeh Awarapan 🕊️
 
Combining Amaal Mallik’s composition, Rashmi Virag’s lyrics and the arresting voice of Arijit Singh, ‘Yeh Awarapan’ is the second song release from the highly awaited ‘Awarapan 2’. Featuring Emraan Hashmi in the video, the song combines his past and present to show how his constant companion is only his Awarapan ❤️‍🩹

snippet.title: Aankhon Se Tune 2.0 | Bhai Tera Star Hai | Raghav, Niharika | Lijo, Dev, Palak, Kumar, Alka, Mohsin
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance of the '90s with Aankhon Se Tune 2.0 from Bhai Tera Star Hai. ❤️🌧️

Inspired by the iconic 90s classic, Aankhon Se Tune 2.0 brings back the charm of evergreen Bollywood romance with a fresh, heartfelt touch. Featuring Raghav and Niharika, this beautiful rendition is perfect for the monsoon season, blending nostalgia with modern melodies.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Details :
Song - Aankhon Se Tune 2.0
Music Composer & Producer: Lijo George
Singers: Dev Negi, Palak Muchhal, Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik
Lyrics: Mohsin Shaikh

Original Music : Jatin-Lalit
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan

Producer - Kumar Taurani 
Director & Choreographer  - Tushar Kalia
Cast : Raghav Juyal & Niharika NM
DOP : Karan Rawat
Production Designer - Patanga Arts ( Ajay & Vipin )
Costume Designer - Deepali Mistry
Assistant costume styles- Yashita Goyal 
Editor: Nitin FCP
DI: NY DI Waala
DI Colourist - Deep Majithia
VFX: ASY Films - Ashutosh Pandey / Snehal Jadhav
Choreographer Manager: Jovita J K
Chief Choreographer: Nishant Bhat
Choreographer Assistants - Vinay Shetty & Sonali Kar
DOP Assistants: Jalesh Oberoi & Rajendra Pawle


Movie Details : 
Banner: Eastwood Pictures & Indian Stories 2 Production
Starring: Raghav Juyal, Sanjay Kapoor, Niharika NM, Barkha Singh, Vikalp Mehta, Vivan
Bhathena, Niki Aneja, Parvathy Omanakuttan, Chandan Roy Sanyal, Tina Desai, Vineeth Beep
Kumar, Naser Al Azzeh and Dev Agrawal
Directed by Vivek B Agrawal
Produced by Vivek B Agrawal, Avantika Hari, Sunil Rupani
Co-Producer – Firuzi Khan
Writers – Sudipto Sarkar & Vivek B Agrawal
Cinematographer - Tribhuvan Babu Sadineni
Costume Designer – Rick Roy
VFX Supervisor – Anuj Deshpande
BGM Music Composer – Shivam Sengupta & Anuj Danait
Choreographer – Shruti & Rohan Shah
Sound Designer – Siddharth Sadashiv
UK EP – Sudipto Sarkar
Supervising Location Manager – Sarbari Sidkar
Art Director – Filipa Pinho


Lyrics : 
Pehli Nazar Mein Tumko Yaara Apna Maan Liya 
Tu Jo Nahi Toh Kuch Nahi Hai 
Ab Yeh Jaan Liya 
Saanse Jal Ne Lagi
Rooh Tadap Ne Lagi 
Tu Bhi Ruk Sa Gaya
Main Bhi Tham Si Gayi
Chaah Raha Hai Yeh Kaisa Nasha 
Aankhon Se Tune Yeh Kya Keh Diya 
Dil Yeh Deewana Dhadkane Laga
Tanhai Mein Hum Mile Is Tarah
Baarish Mein Shola Bhadakne Laga
Tu Tadapne Laga Main Machalne Lagi
Boond Tan Pe Giri Jaan Machalne Lagi
Chha Raha Hai Ajab Sa Nasha
Aankhon Se Tune Yeh Kya Keh Diya 
Dil Yeh Deewana Dhadkane Laga
Antra : 
Thodee Sardee Bhee Hai, Thodee Garmee Bhee Hai
Thodee Hai Bebasee, Thodee Marjee Bhee Hai
Aise Me Ham Bhala, Kya Karen Tu Bata
Jo Bhee Hota Hai Woh, Hone De Dil Ruba
Aankhon Se Tune Yeh Kya Keh Diya 
Dil Yeh Deewana Dhadkane Laga

Boond Tan Pe Giri Jaan Machalne Lagi
Chha Raha Hai Ajab Sa Nasha
Aankhon Se Tune Yeh Kya Keh Diya 
Dil Yeh Deewana Dhadkane Laga

كانوا مني بيتمنوا الكلمة والنعمة اللي في إيديك

ده انت كتر ألف خيرك أصلاً إنك سيبتني

أول ما هتمشي هقول كان ماضي خلاص لازم أنساه
على قلبك انت الله يعينك مش هيلاقي حد معاه
مين غيري اللي بيملى حياتك قلبك ده مفيش غيري فيه
هتحس بفرق وجودي معاك بين قبله وبين بعديه
